mapper.select: select member_id as memberId , user_id as userId , password , member_name as memberName , nickname , phone , email , profile_image_url as profileImageUrl , user_type as userType , login_type as loginType , status , last_login_at as lastLoginAt , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt from app_member where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
